{{Quote|As for the bottle of Zairona Ale you received… that's an illegal beverage, so keep it out of sight. And make darned sure Aeron never sees it, she'd go ballistic! Dad once gave me a swig of that stuff when I was your age. I'll never forget it. He said it would put hair on my chest. Well, he was right. In fact, it put hair on my chest, back, forehead, elbows… you name it! It'll knock the Force right out of you. So take it easy, okay?|[[Emon Azzameen]]'s [[e-mail]] to [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]]|<ref name="XWA" />}}
'''Zairona Ale''' was a strong, very rare [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage that was illegal in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Its source was somewhere in the [[Forbidden Zones]].

[[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] got a bottle of Zairona Ale after a battle with [[Loose Cannon pirates]] shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. [[Emon Azzameen]] mentioned that his father gave him a swig when he was a child, so he could get some hair on his chest. As he put it, it put hair on his chest, legs, arms, and every other part of his body. Zairona Ale might have been sold aboard the casino/resort space station, the ''[[Dunari's Rest]]'', as its [[drinking chit]] showed a drink on it that was similar in appearance to the illegal alcoholic drink.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
